title: Vanilla HUD Refresh
description: Refreshes the heart, armor, hunger and bubble sprites and all EXP-bar related textures!
body:
**Refreshes the HUD in Minecraft.**
![HUD-Refresh sprites!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64e3606613890dde8b16e73b11d8c8f732220f9a.png)

**This resource pack changes:**
- Health bar
- Armor bar
- Hunger bar
- Oxygen bar
- EXP bar
- Jump bar
- Locator bar

**Mod support:**
- Appleskin

**Credits:**
- Includes content by Vanilla Tweaks: vanillatweaks.net, For original hunger bar steak sprites that I have altered.
- Includes content by [TheOneTrueDev]: modrinth.com/user/TheOneTrueDev, licensed under CC BY 4.0, For the hearts, armor (that I have altered) and bubble sprites.  
- Includes content using this tool: custom-xp.enchanted.games, For the XP bar.
